steps.title: Gather the $x$ terms
steps.content: Start with $$13x=112-x.$$ Add $x$ to both sides so all $x$ terms are on one side: $$14x=112.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Check: $13(8)=104$ and $112-8=104$, so the solution is 8. Both sides match, which confirms the value solves the original equation, not just the simplified one.
